docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,006.30 FILED BY ARTDESIGNS AS TO DEFENDANT LEM CONSTRUCTION INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARTDESIGNS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEM CONSTRUCTION INC. $513.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $528.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT LEM CONSTRUCTION INC.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23032, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARTDESIGNS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LEM CONSTRUCTION INC. PLTFF. TO PAY DEFEND. $38 COURT COST. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23032 ON 3-24-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
